title: Public Rental Scheme - Family Scheme
text:
Public Rental Scheme - Family Scheme - SupportGoWhere
Public Rental Scheme - Family Scheme
Share link
Provides heavily subsidised rental flats for Singaporean households with no other housing options and no family support.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Subsidised rental flat from HDB
Apply online via HDB's website
Apply now
Collapse all sections
About this support

Subsidised rental flat from HDB

Who is this for?

21 years old and above

Singapore Citizen

Form a family nucleus with at least another SC or SPR. A family nucleus refers to one of the following:

You and your spouse

If single, you and your parents

If widowed/divorced, you and your children under your legal care and control

If orphaned, you and your siblings

No family support and no other housing options. HDB will assess this based on your individual circumstances such as your household income, household size and housing budget

Not existing HDB flat owners, essential occupiers, tenants under HDB’s rental schemes or private property owners

For families with children below 21 years old, your application comes under the ComLink+ Rental Scheme, which offers customised support from government agencies and community partners

How to apply?

You can apply online at the HDB website

You will need to provide the required supporting documents

Where can I find help?

View more details

HDB Branch Service Line: 6225-5432

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 15 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
